theme.docs.versions.unreleasedVersionLab.message: This is the {versionLabel} documentation — released, but not yet the default version.
theme.docs.versions.unreleasedVersionLab.description: Banner shown on V2 (preview) pages. V2 is released (image 2.0.0, published chart) but V1 is still the default at the root, so the stock 'unreleased / in active development' wording would be wrong.

theme.docs.versions.latestVersionSuggest.description: Points readers from the V2 preview to the default V1 docs.

theme.docs.versions.latestVersionLinkLab.description: Link text for the default (latest) version in the version banner.
